title: Universal Lead Generator Input
description: Generate leads for any industry and any persona from Google Maps, LinkedIn, business directories, and general web search.

icpDescription.title: Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) — describe who you want in plain English
icpDescription.description: The only field you really need. Describe who you're targeting: industry/business type, persona/job titles, region, company size, pain points, etc. If you leave the fields below empty, the actor uses AI (Groq) to derive the search terms, location, and persona titles straight from this text — and it scores every lead's fit against it. (AI derivation needs a Groq key; see the Groq fields lower down.)
icpDescription.prefill: UK-based independent dental clinics in London with 5-30 staff. Best contacts are the Practice Manager or Owner. Looking for practices without an online booking system.

searchQueries.title: Local business search terms (optional — auto-derived from ICP)
searchQueries.description: Business types to look up in the local business source (OpenStreetMap), e.g. ["dental clinics", "dentists"]. Leave empty to auto-derive these from your ICP (requires a Groq key). A `location` is also needed for this source.

keywords.title: Keywords (LinkedIn / directory / web search)
keywords.description: Industry/company keywords used to build LinkedIn, directory, and web-search queries. Defaults to searchQueries (or the ICP-derived terms) if left empty.

personaTitles.title: Persona job titles (optional — auto-derived from ICP)
personaTitles.description: Job titles of your ideal contact, e.g. ["Practice Manager", "Owner"]. Leave empty to auto-derive from your ICP (requires a Groq key), else a generic owner/founder/director list is used.

location.title: Location (optional — auto-derived from ICP)
location.description: City, region, or country to target, e.g. "London, UK". Used across all sources and required by the local business source. Leave empty to auto-derive from your ICP (requires a Groq key).

countryCode.title: Country code (optional — auto-derived from ICP)
countryCode.description: 2-letter country code, e.g. GB, US, used for proxy routing. Leave empty to auto-derive from your ICP/location (requires a Groq key).

directoryUrls.title: Directory URLs (optional)
directoryUrls.description: Specific business-directory search/listing URLs to crawl (Yell, Thomson Local, etc). If empty and the directory source is enabled, a Yell search is built automatically from keywords + location.

sources.title: Lead sources to run
sources.description: Which sources to run. Defaults to all four. (The legacy id "googleMaps" is still accepted and maps to "localBusiness".)

maxResultsPerSource.title: Max results per source
maxResultsPerSource.description: Cap on how many leads each individual source (per query) can return.

minScoreThreshold.title: Minimum ICP score threshold
minScoreThreshold.description: Only export leads scoring at or above this value (0-100).

enrichWebsites.title: Enrich leads from their websites
enrichWebsites.description: Visit each lead's website (and contact page) to extract emails, phone numbers, and social links.

onlyLeadsWithContact.title: Only keep leads with a contact method
onlyLeadsWithContact.description: Drop leads that have no email, phone, or website before scoring/export — keep only ones you can actually reach.

maxLeads.title: Max leads to export
maxLeads.description: Hard cap on the number of (highest-scoring) leads exported. 0 = no cap.

fetchLinkedInPublicProfiles.title: Fetch LinkedIn public profile pages
fetchLinkedInPublicProfiles.description: Best-effort fetch of each discovered LinkedIn profile's public page for extra detail. Uses no cookies/login; some profiles may be behind a login wall and will keep only the search-snippet data.

useApifyActors.title: Use external Apify Actors (paid) for richer data
useApifyActors.description: When ON, the local-business, LinkedIn, and directory sources first try a proven external Apify Actor (Google Maps, LinkedIn, directory) and only fall back to the built-in crawlers if those can't run. ⚠️ Requires an Apify plan that permits running public Actors, and those Actors bill you separately (a few cents per result). On a plan that can't run public Actors, leave this OFF — the built-in crawlers are used instead.

mapsActorId.title: Google Maps Actor id
mapsActorId.description: External Apify Actor used for local businesses when 'Use external Apify Actors' is ON. Leave default unless you prefer another Google Maps Actor.

linkedinActorId.title: LinkedIn Actor id
linkedinActorId.description: External Apify Actor used for LinkedIn people search when 'Use external Apify Actors' is ON.

directoryActorId.title: Directory Actor id (optional)
directoryActorId.description: Optional external Apify Actor for business directories when 'Use external Apify Actors' is ON. Leave empty to always use the built-in directory crawler.

groqApiKey.title: Groq API key
groqApiKey.description: Used to score every lead against your ICP via Groq's hosted LLM API. If omitted, a simple rule-based fallback score is used instead.

groqModel.title: Groq model
groqModel.description: Groq model used for lead scoring.

outputFormat.title: Output format
outputFormat.description: Choose whether to output JSON, CSV, or both to the key-value store (the Apify Dataset always gets the structured records).
